hypothesis: If a conditional variational autoencoder is trained on Li–Si–X structures and conditioned on the presence of Si and Li, target capacity >1500 mAh/g, and a large stable Li-channel radius, then it will generate novel silicon-based anode materials that after CHGNet relaxation exhibit >1500 mAh/g capacity and retain similarly large Li+ migration channels between charged and discharged states with low energy variation.
